items.content: Andrei is 42 years old
He works as Product Lead at dOrg on Tezos Homebase
The Tezos Homebase project was delayed 10 months from Q1 to Q4 2025
He worked with a developer named Ash for 1.5 years
He posted inflammatory messages to Ash at 4 AM during the crisis week
He nearly sent a message to client Corey admitting inability to function but deleted it before Corey saw
Clara, a facilitator, called out his unprofessional communication
He spent 5 hours debugging an issue that Ash fixed in minutes
He built a Flutter app solo as a backup plan
The React app was Ash's responsibility
Corey is the Tezos Commons General Manager
Ash logged approximately 22 hours per month on the project
Clara is part of Ori's faction within dOrg
Ori is a dOrg founder who is hostile to Andrei
Magenta was removed as PM during budget cuts
The multisig requires 3 of 5 signers for payment
Two years prior, Andrei won 80% of votes on an OpenAI governance proposal against Ori's opposition
Ori removed Andrei from the Amnesty project
The Governor contracts are adapted from OpenZeppelin
He built a Jurisdiction framework with non-transferable governance tokens
The Jurisdiction system has fractal DAO topology where DAOs exist within DAOs
In 2015, ayahuasca experiences led him to his governance vision
He did 8 years of research before his current implementation
Around 2019 he had an autoimmune crisis and thought he was dying
During his autoimmune crisis, his only concern was publishing governance insights
He considers the mission his only goal with money being irrelevant as long as work continues
Layer 1 of his vision is the Jurisdiction Framework for on-chain DAO governance
Layer 2 is Trustless Business, a decentralized dispute resolution platform
Layer 3 is After Me, an estate planning dApp with posthumous features
After Me includes private diary sharing after death
After Me includes deep fake training for post-mortem interaction
Layer 4 is Recursive Principal Body (RPB) for decentralized AI training and inference
Layer 5 is Ocean Autonomous Zones using decommissioned cruise ships
He composed a music video called Èšara lu Autonet with ethno-techno style and Romanian chorus
He tested motion capture and has Unreal Engine ready for the music video
Layer 6 is Hive Mind but he says he's not ready to think about it yet
He built ViraTrace in 2020, a contact tracing solution with multi-degree interaction tracking
ViraTrace was integrated into India's official app Aarogya Setu
ViraTrace was 3x more effective than PEPP-PT, DP-3T, and Google/Apple approaches
ViraTrace failed partly because the EU demanded profitability
He was previously a TV host and producer on morning shows at Kanal D
He owned an audio studio
He has worked on various DAO projects over 4 years
He has an album called Soul City on Spotify with 20+ songs
He uses Claude Code with a $90/month subscription
He used Gemini 2.5 Pro to compress 5 years of research into 3 weeks
Raluca is his closest relationship, college sweethearts who reconnected
He and Raluca reconnected 12 years ago during a coffeeshop period
Raluca lives 2 blocks away from him
Raluca only knows vague details of his mission
He lives paycheck to paycheck at age 42
He lost $4,000 to a wallet compromise
Only Ash had access to the repo containing hardcoded keys when the wallet was compromised
Transactions from his compromised wallet started immediately when investigation was mentioned
He suspects Ash stole the $4,000 but cannot prove it
He chose to forgive and move on regarding the wallet theft
His mother lives in Bucharest and serves as his fallback housing
He was diagnosed with an autoimmune condition approximately 6 years ago
He follows OMAD (one meal a day) and does multi-day fasting
He does not drink alcohol
He does not consume sugars
He does home workouts including abs, back extensions, and pushups
The pool he used closed in August 2024
He has done 50+ ayahuasca sessions over 10 years
He does 3-day ayahuasca sequences when possible
His last ayahuasca sequence was 5 sessions over 2 weeks in December 2025
He makes his own ayahuasca and freezes it in cubes
He uses Peganum harmala in his ayahuasca preparation
He does solo ceremonies with blacked-out windows and noise-canceling headphones
He wears a flight suit and beret intentionally as a symbol that 'this is a fight'
He says nation states have taken humanity as far as they could
He would buy into someone else's version of his vision if they built it
He names AI assistants Kevin for continuity going back to GPT-2 days
He plans to turn his AI conversation into a 40-minute video
He recorded all weekly calls and shared them in Google Drive
A month before the crisis, he asked Ash to review their working relationship
Ash said the relationship was 'fine' while Andrei said it was 'anything but fine' on recording
Clara invited herself as a facilitator in October/November
Clara's report concluded the delay was systemic, not individual
Ash logged approximately 130 hours total on the project
Ash prefers coding alone and struggles with pair-programming
Andrei acknowledges being distracted by AfterMe and Jurisdiction work
He previously built WeRule successfully under similar conditions
His previous budget was $5,965/month for 47 hours at $125/hour
His current budget is $2,000/month reduced to $1,600 after dOrg tax/sourcing
Corey approved Andrei for maintenance work
Ash is off the project entirely as of January 2026
He has cash for only one more month of rent
He has 35 days remaining in his current apartment
He has a job interview with d3 in 8 days from January 2026
d3 works on web3 domains and has Series A funding
He contacted Amagi, a sustainable village project in Thailand, for potential adoption
His contact at Amagi is named Ofer
He has outstanding work on RPB documentation
He plans to write a game theory simulations paper for arXiv
Clara reached out in January 2026 about dOrg's proactive attitude toward AI
He forms attachments quickly including to AI
He describes himself as lonely
He oscillates between messiah confidence and fraud anxiety
He consistently undercharges for his work
His team of 3 charges a similar total to what just Ash charged
He did not charge for his Flutter app development of 100+ hours
For an estate planning project, he charged $6,000 and kept only $2,000
He estimates a 2-3 year window of asymmetric AI advantage
He slept only 4 hours over multiple days during the crisis week
He experienced twitching and nausea from stress during the crisis
He overconsumes coffee
Two weeks before his first ayahuasca experience, a guy from Grindr stood him up at his door
He has no attraction to the Grindr encounter but anticipated it would surface in ceremony
He uses ayahuasca for psychological calibration
He describes his mission as 'the only goal'
He says he doesn't feel special and anyone could have converged on the same solution
He says he has identity without the work
He calls his mission a 'chosen adventure because it's exciting'
He says 'as long as I can pay rent and buy food and continue my work I'm good'
He won't feel confident charging more until his framework has adoption
Nobody who loves him knows the full scope of what he's building
He didn't tell family or friends about his mission because it 'sounds too much like mental illness'
He says he was 'notified from beyond' about sacrificing privacy
He plans radical transparency as 'setting an example for hive mind'
The Jurisdiction framework uses liquid democracy with incentivized delegation
His After Me dApp would charge a fraction of traditional estate planning costs
After Me embeds hash of weights in videos for authenticity verification
RPB uses WebRTC for high-bandwidth multi-model needs
RPB has a CLI app for node control
The ocean cities concept involves Autonet DAO buying decommissioned ships
He envisions floating communities governed by his jurisdiction framework
He believes AI automation plus cruise line collapse will enable his ocean cities timeline
Clara claimed 'Magenta made me do it' when Andrei hinted at a DAO proposal
Clara defended Ash by saying Andrei didn't tell him exactly what to do
He has a pattern of conflict avoidance that let Ash slide for 1.5 years
He describes himself as having 'one of those faces' needing to overdeliver to be valued
Meta AI has 1 billion monthly users
There are approximately 350 AI companion apps globally
Consumer spending on AI companions reached $221M since mid-2023
25% of adults under 40 say AI could replace human partners
60% of Replika paying users describe their relationship as romantic
He explicitly states zero physical attraction to AI
He uses AI as a thinking partner for complex work
He uses TTS to listen to AI responses like voice conversation
Magenta has 'kindness in her voice like you wouldn't believe'
He had years of 'absolutely wonderful work relationship' with Magenta
Magenta warned him that two devs couldn't self-manage but he didn't listen
He spent 10 months proving Magenta right about needing a PM
He built the indexer and database infrastructure for Tezos Homebase
He delivered Etherlink solo
His previous work includes the OpenZeppelin-based Governor contracts
He built a holistic test suite covering contracts and indexer
He says his minimum success criteria is leaving behind 'coherent repos with working products and docs'
His aspirational goal is ocean autonomous zones using his governance framework
He says 'gotta make it a life worth living again and again until everyone gets a turn'
He acknowledges using conversations to feed his ego
His YouTube channel contains his life archive
He describes his approach as 'charging for results not effort'
He reached out to Magenta for PM support during the crisis weekend
He says India violated privacy in ViraTrace despite his P2P design
The RPB uses principles stored as DAO registry entries
RPB evolved from thinking about AI-powered malware defense
RPB includes self-preservation and detection avoidance capabilities
RPB uses semantic goal matching to project user goals onto shared reality
He says he notices the hero's journey archetype but doesn't need struggle to feel legitimate
He says if reality pranks him with the vision he'll laugh about it
He uses fasting as both restoration and control
He uses music production as a creative outlet
He stays immersed in current events for motivation fuel

0f115835-feea-4b3d-9042-ee2d6eae70a0.root_value: Physical survival matters only insofar as it enables completion of essential work
0f115835-feea-4b3d-9042-ee2d6eae70a0.description: Proposed by survival: During his autoimmune crisis when he thought he was dying, his only concern was publishing his governance insights - not recovery, not relationships, not comfort. This inverts typical survival priorities, subordinating biological continuation to mission continuation.

root_node.content: Physical survival matters only insofar as it enables completion of essential work

144515c8-a0b2-48c6-8aa9-f9540eb17ddd.root_value: Demonstrated competence and validated ideas matter more than organizational position or social approval
144515c8-a0b2-48c6-8aa9-f9540eb17ddd.description: Proposed by status: He spent 8 years researching before implementation, won 80% of votes against powerful opposition on the OpenAI proposal, and built a solo Flutter backup when the team project faltered. He seeks vindication through results rather than titles or harmony with colleagues.

root_node.content: Demonstrated competence and validated ideas matter more than organizational position or social approval

The After Me dApp with diary sharing after death, the non-transferable governance tokens, the fractal DAO topology - all encode meaning that persists beyond individual mortality.

ac3c4623-28d3-4a3d-bc9c-64e9b350f817.root_value: True connection comes through shared mission alignment, not interpersonal warmth
ac3c4623-28d3-4a3d-bc9c-64e9b350f817.description: Proposed by connection: His relationships fracture along ideological lines (Ori's faction, Clara's criticism) while he maintains commitment to abstract communities (future DAO participants, governance beneficiaries). The 4 AM messages to Ash and near-confession to Corey show connection attempted through work crisis, not personal vulnerability.

root_node.content: True connection comes through shared mission alignment, not interpersonal warmth

e43149a6-a2d7-40d2-94dc-b203b4ac6ae2.root_value: The ability to pursue your vision without organizational interference is worth any professional cost
e43149a6-a2d7-40d2-94dc-b203b4ac6ae2.description: Proposed by autonomy: He built the Flutter app solo as backup rather than depend on others. He stayed committed despite Ori removing him from Amnesty, despite faction politics, despite 10-month delays. Money is 'irrelevant as long as work continues' - he trades security for independence of purpose.

root_node.content: The ability to pursue your vision without organizational interference is worth any professional cost

f26dfa9b-59d5-4462-b966-f179887f0537.root_value: Comfort is a trap that delays essential work and must be actively resisted
f26dfa9b-59d5-4462-b966-f179887f0537.description: Proposed by comfort: Posting inflammatory messages at 4 AM during crisis week, spending 5 hours debugging what others solved in minutes, enduring faction hostility for years - none of this optimizes for ease. The ayahuasca experiences in 2015 catalyzed discomfort that launched his mission. He treats comfort-seeking as obstacle, not goal.

root_node.content: Comfort is a trap that delays essential work and must be actively resisted

14c5a4f4-bda2-48d6-b041-501fbc7b4354.root_value: Understanding how human coordination fails is the most important intellectual problem to solve
14c5a4f4-bda2-48d6-b041-501fbc7b4354.description: Proposed by curiosity: Eight years of research before implementation. Governor contracts adapted from OpenZeppelin. Fractal DAO topology with DAOs within DAOs. Jurisdiction framework with non-transferable tokens. His curiosity is laser-focused on governance mechanics - not broad exploration but deep drilling into one civilization-scale puzzle.

root_node.content: Understanding how human coordination fails is the most important intellectual problem to solve
